creator: dmcgregor@home.com
text:
If the FreeBSD screen saver is loaded (I use blank_saver),
the system will crash after about 10 Hours with the screen saver on.
The problem seems to be a bug in the new syscons driver.

Fix: 

I don't have one, but I'll work on it :)
How-To-Repeat: 
	type kldload blank_saver then vidcontrol -t 10
and wait for a few hours
